risk_factors: Dependency upgrade from PostgreSQL JDBC driver 42.7.5 to 42.7.7 may introduce compatibility issues with existing database connections
No changelog or release notes verification performed for the specific version upgrade to assess potential breaking changes
positive_findings: Single dependency version update follows standard dependency management practices
Change is minimal and isolated to version property update only
PostgreSQL JDBC driver updates typically include bug fixes and security patches
risk_summary: This is a minor version update of the PostgreSQL JDBC driver that poses minimal risk. The change is isolated to a single property update and PostgreSQL driver updates typically include stability improvements and security fixes.
